name: ragent
description: Connect Claude Desktop to RAGent's hybrid search MCP server. Combines BM25 keyword matching and vector embeddings on Amazon OpenSearch for high-quality document retrieval.
long_description:
RAGent is a CLI tool for building RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems from Markdown documents using hybrid search (BM25 + vector) with Amazon S3 Vectors and OpenSearch.

This MCPB package connects Claude Desktop to a running RAGent MCP server via mcp-proxy, bridging stdio transport to RAGent's SSE endpoint.

**Prerequisites:**
- A running RAGent MCP server (`ragent mcp-server`)
- [uv](https://docs.astral.sh/uv/) installed for the `uvx` command

tools.name: hybrid_search
tools.description: Run hybrid retrieval across the knowledge base by blending BM25 keyword matching and vector embeddings on Amazon OpenSearch. Returns fused results with relevance scores and source references.

server_url.title: Server URL
server_url.description: Streamable HTTP endpoint URL of your running RAGent MCP server (e.g., http://localhost:8080/mcp)
